# CareCost 79% Baseline (2026-04-25)

## What this is
The best HTML→PPTX output from the CareCost pitch deck session. Austin rated these at ~79% quality — the baseline our pipeline's first pass must beat.

## Gold standard PPTXs (generated by slides_to_pptx.py)
- `carecost-competitive-slides-editable.pptx` — 8 slides: market, competitive landscape, differentiation, moat
- `carecost-slides-batch2-editable.pptx` — 6 slides: market, competition, business model

## Source HTML slides (individual files, one per slide)
Each PPTX was assembled from individual HTML slides. Multiple variants exist per topic (v1, v2, v3) — the PPTX contains the best variant chosen during the session.

### competitive-editable source map
| Slide | Content | HTML source candidates |
|-------|---------|----------------------|
| s1-2 | MARKET + SOLUTION | slide-market-v1.html, slide-market-v3.html |
| s3 | Competitive quadrant | slide-quadrant-scatter.html, slide-quadrant-crosshair.html |
| s4 | Three things nobody does | slide-competitive-landscape-v1.html |
| s5-6 | Eight structural locks | slide-structural-locks-1.html, slide-structural-locks-2.html |
| s7 | Five differentiators | slide-five-things.html |
| s8 | Dual flywheel moat | slide-dual-flywheel.html |

### batch2-editable source map
| Slide | Content | HTML source candidates |
|-------|---------|----------------------|
| s1-2 | MARKET | slide-market-v1.html variants |
| s3-4 | COMPETITION & MARKET | slide-quadrant or competitive variants |
| s5 | BUSINESS MODEL v1 | slide-business-model-v1.html |
| s6 | BUSINESS MODEL v2 | slide-business-model-v2.html |

## Pipeline used
These were generated by `slides_to_pptx.py` (draft engine, sidecar JSON), NOT `html_to_pptx.py` (final engine, DOM extraction).

## Goal
First-pass pipeline output should match or beat 79%. Convergence rounds should push to 90%+. HTML→PPTX layout similarity target: 95%.
